message:
fix(config,deploy,lib): normalize agent names in path mappings and simplify deploy site resolution

Three targeted fixes across the config, deploy, and test infrastructure:

1. Path mapping agent filtering now normalizes agent names before comparison
   (trim, lowercase, replace hyphens with underscores) so "claude-code" and
   "claude_code" match the same agent. Previously, hyphenated agent names in
   config would silently fail to match underscore-variant names from source
   metadata. The normalization logic is extracted into module-private helpers
   (agent_name_key, path_mapping_applies_to_agent) that replace the method
   on PathMapping, keeping the public API surface clean.

2. resolve_deploy_site_dir() is simplified to delegate directly to
   resolve_site_dir(), removing redundant directory-structure probing that
   rejected valid deployment directories lacking an explicit site/ subdirectory.
   The corresponding test is updated from a rejection assertion to an
   acceptance assertion.

3. Legacy source filter tests replace open_franken_analytics_db (read-only
   analytics connection) with open_legacy_local_db_for_update (writable
   connection) for tests that perform UPDATE statements, fixing a category
   error where write operations were sent through a read-only path. Error
   kind string normalized from "file-read" to "file_read" for consistency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
